arts.ttl: Manchester United’s Zirkzee eyeing return to Italy: Juventus and Milan on alert
arts.sum: Calciomercato report how Joshua Zirkzee’s stint at Manchester United has quickly turned from joy to disappointment. After scoring on his debut, the Dutch striker has struggled to find playing time and consistency under manager Erik ten Hag. With Rasmus Hojlund now firmly established as the first-choice striker, Zirkzee has been relegated to the bench, leading to speculation about his future at Old Trafford. The English press has been unforgiving, labeling Zirkzee a £36 million flop – the amount Manchester United paid to Bologna to secure his services last summer. arts.ttl: Champions League | Milan v Club Brugge: Match Preview
arts.sum: AC Milan will look to kickstart their faltering Champions League campaign when they host Club Brugge at the San Siro on Tuesday night. The seven-time European champions are desperate for points after losing their opening two group matches, while the Belgian side arrive with renewed confidence following a win over Sturm Graz. Paulo Fonseca’s AC Milan side have endured a difficult start to their Champions League campaign, suffering back-to-back defeats against Liverpool (3-1) and Bayer Leverkusen (1-0).
